Blitzle

#0521 Unfezant #0523 Zebstrika
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Blitzle is an Electric type Pokémon introduced in Generation 5.

Blitzle

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0522
Type Electric
Species Electrified Pokémon
Height 0.8 m (2′07″)
Weight 29.8 kg (65.7 lbs)
Abilities 1. Lightning Rod
2. Motor Drive
Sap Sipper (hidden ability)
Local № 0028 (Black/White)
0147 (Black 2/White 2)
0023 (The Indigo Disk)

Training

EV yield 1 Speed
Catch rate 190 (24.8% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 59
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Field
Gender 50% male, 50% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

Base stats

HP 45
200 294
Attack 60
112 240
Defense 32
62 179
Sp. Atk 50
94 218
Sp. Def 32
62 179
Speed 76
141 276
Total 295 Min Max

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0522
Blitzle
Electric
(Level 27)
#0523
Zebstrika
Electric

Blitzle changes

  • In Generations 5-7, Blitzle has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Black Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use their flashing manes to communicate with one another.
White When thunderclouds cover the sky, it will appear. It can catch lightning with its mane and store the electricity.
Black 2
White 2		 Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use the frequency and rhythm of these flashes to communicate.
X
Omega Ruby		 When thunderclouds cover the sky, it will appear. It can catch lightning with its mane and store the electricity.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 Its mane shines when it discharges electricity. They use the frequency and rhythm of these flashes to communicate.

Moves learned by Blitzle

  • In other generations
  • 5

  • 7
  • 8
  • 9
Legends: Z-A Scarlet/Violet

Moves learnt by level up

Blitzle does not learn any level up moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Moves learnt by TM

Blitzle cannot be taught any TM moves in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

Egg moves

Blitzle learns the following moves via breeding or picnics in Pokémon Scarlet & Violet. Details and compatible parents can be found on the Blitzle gen 9 learnset page.

Type
Cat.
Power
Acc.
Double KickFighting 30 100
FeintNormal 30 100
Sand AttackGround — 100

Other languages

English Blitzle
Japanese シママ (Shimama)
German Elezeba
French Zébribon
Italian Blitzle
Spanish Blitzle
Korean 줄뮤마 (julmyuma)
Chinese (Simplified) 斑斑马
Chinese (Traditional) 斑斑馬

 

English Electrified Pokémon
Japanese たいでんポケモン
German Hochspannungs-Pokémon
French Pokémon Étincélec
Italian Pokémon Caricavolt
Spanish Pokémon Electrizado
Korean 하전포켓몬
Chinese (Simplified) 带电宝可梦
Chinese (Traditional) 帶電寶可夢

Name origin

blitz
a swift attack; German for ‘lightning’
little
small
